entry.title: IDC W56HZV17D0071 (P00062) awarded to AM GENERAL LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W3ZL OFC PM SANG MOD PROG

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION FOR FMS CASE JO-B-YCA FOR JORDAN RESET PHASE II TO REMOVE FUNDS FROM CLIN 0194AC AND CREATE CLINS 0194AD AND 0194AE AND UPDATE ATTACHMENT 0042.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: MILITARY ARMORED VEHICLE, TANK, AND TANK COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
